title: Floral Velvety Kenyan Ricotta Skillet
description: A one-pot, low-sodium Kenyan dish featuring ricotta, air-fried to perfection with floral notes. This velvety skillet combines the richness of ricotta with the brightness of Kenyan spices.
instructions: In a bowl, whisk together ricotta cheese, jasmine tea-infused milk, Kenyan berbere spice, and salt-free seasoning blend.
In the air fryer basket, add the diced red bell pepper and yellow onion. Air-fry for 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the air fryer basket and air-fry for an additional 1 minute.
In a large skillet, add the air-fryer friendly oil over medium heat.
Pour the ricotta mixture into the skillet and stir to combine with the air-fried vegetables.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the mixture is velvety and heated through.
Stir in chopped fresh cilantro and lemon juice.
Serve the floral velvety Kenyan ricotta skillet hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
